pattern: With at most eight bags, you can search every assignment of bags to children with backtracking, tracking each child's running total and pruning branches that already exceed the best found unfairness.
hints: The unfairness of a distribution is whichever child ends up with the most cookies, and you want to minimize that maximum.
Assign bags one at a time to the k children, keeping each child's current total, and recurse over the choices.
Backtrack across all assignments; prune whenever a child's total would exceed the best complete distribution found so far, and skip giving a bag to two children that currently have identical totals.

edge_inputs.description: five bags split among two children
eight bags evenly split three ways
one huge bag dominates the unfairness
maximum children means each gets one bag

stress.description: random small bag set with a valid child count
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randrange(2, 9)
    cookies = [rng.randrange(1, 100001) for _ in range(n)]
    k = rng.randrange(2, n + 1)
    return [cookies, k]
stress.note: keeps n <= 8 so the exponential search stays fast
